verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We read of a place that's called heaven, It's made for the pure and the free; These truths in God's Word He hath given, How beautiful heaven must be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How beautiful heaven must be, Sweet home of the happy and free; Fair haven of rest for the weary, How beautiful heaven must be.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The angels so sweetly are singing, Up there by the beautiful sea; Sweet chords from their gold harps are ringing, How beautiful heaven must be.
